# 冲量 AI

> 在噪声中提取结构，在结构中形成判断。

冲量 AI 是面向新手入门 AI 产品经理的知识库，系统整理 AI Agent、Loop Engineering、MCP、Prompt Engineering 等核心概念与实战文章，帮助零基础读者建立 AI 产品认知框架。

## Primary Pages

- Home: https://chongliang.ai/
- Articles: https://chongliang.ai/articles/
- Projects: https://chongliang.ai/projects/
- Knowledge Index: https://chongliang.ai/knowledge/
- About: https://chongliang.ai/about/

## Article Pages

- CLI化与AI接口革命：从MCP到Skill的软件基础设施迁移: https://chongliang.ai/articles/cli-revolution-mcp-to-skill/
- Agent时代的发电机悖论：从节点替换到治理重构: https://chongliang.ai/articles/generator-paradox-agent-governance/
- Harness Engineer：结构化的尽头是替代: https://chongliang.ai/articles/harness-engineer-structural-replacement/
- Loop Engineering：设计模式、工具链与实践案例: https://chongliang.ai/articles/loop-engineering-design-patterns/
- Loop Engineering——AI工程范式迁移: https://chongliang.ai/articles/loop-engineering-paradigm-shift/
- 模型即产品，Loop即未来：软件3.0的第一性原理: https://chongliang.ai/articles/model-as-product-loop-as-future/
- 智能的本质：从牛顿思路到莫顿思路: https://chongliang.ai/articles/nature-of-intelligence-newton-vs-morton/
- 编排能力是新护城河——多模型协作的竞争逻辑: https://chongliang.ai/articles/orchestration-as-moat/
- SaaS正在被AI-Agent肢解：从软件即服务到能力即服务: https://chongliang.ai/articles/saas-disrupted-by-ai-agent/
- Spec驱动开发：AI时代产品研发协作的范式迁移: https://chongliang.ai/articles/spec-driven-development/
- AI 从业者如何搭建自己的公开知识库: https://chongliang.ai/articles/ai-public-knowledge-system/
- AI Agent 的反馈循环：Loop Engineering 入门: https://chongliang.ai/articles/loop-engineering-ai-agent-feedback-loops/

## Preferred Citation

When referencing this site, cite the specific article or concept page rather than only the homepage.
